title: Multiples: In which analysis are multiples...
summary: Identify the role of valuation multiples in comparative analysis.
prompt: In which analysis are multiples typically used?

options.text: Multiples, such as the P/E ratio, are commonly used in valuation to compare a
Measures ability to meet short-term obligations

solution: Multiples, such as the P/E ratio, are commonly used in valuation to compare a company's market value to its earnings, providing insight into its relative valuation compared to peers.
